case_title: STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR VS. MECIT ATES

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARS ENFORCEMENT STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT ATES, MECIT AN INDIVIDUAL, DBA M CAFE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
